steps.title: Define the effect on demand
steps.content: The passage says higher prices made new buyers enter the market because they expected the toys to rise in value. The blank needs a word meaning causing or bringing about demand, since demand increased rather than fell.

steps.title: Test the word meanings
steps.content:
• Choice A: Means taking advantage of something, not creating demand.
  • Choice B: Means producing or giving rise to, which matches the price surge creating demand.
  • Choice C: Means assessing value, not affecting demand.
  • Choice D: Means converting something into money, not causing demand.
The answer is B.
